sysevent_in_email_action.description:
This Inboud Action creates a task when a task is recieved by the system with "My Task" at the start of the subject line 2.8.1 | 2022-10-24 - raj - STRY0131148 - Add New Table for Tasker User in preparation for Out of Office - this script really only changes the Org User to match the Org Member
2.7 | 2022-04-07 | mmcc | DFCT0010849 - My task html email styling can bleed into the tab causing display and link issues Use a regular expression to clear specific pattern for a <style> tag; save untouched data in Suggested Task table 2.8 - 2022-03-09 - raj - STRY0114577 - Remove API Calls from Run Template 2021-11-11 | raj | DFCT0010647 - "My Task" - Personal Task Email does NOT copy attachments into SharePoint Library using DocIntegrator
sysevent_in_email_action.name: My Task - Create Personal Suggested Task
sysevent_in_email_action.sys_name: My Task - Create Personal Suggested Task
